programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Affair at the Victory Ball
programme.desc: The sleuth is invited to attend a masquerade ball dressed as someone famous and modestly goes as himself - and finds time amid the revelry to solve the murder of aristocratic fellow guest Lord Cronshaw. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The discovery of a 2,000-year-old body provides fresh evidence in a five-year-old unsolved missing persons case, so Morse and Thursday take up the investigation, discovering a possible link to a local pagan ritual to celebrate the harvest. The investigation leads them to a nuclear power station, where they face a conspiracy of silence concerning an experimental new reactor and a potential disaster that could devastate Oxford. Guest starring Sheila Hancock, widow of original Inspector Morse star John Thaw.(n)

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Elizabeth Bancroft is running an operation to against a vicious gang and adopts dubious methods to bring down the brothers who run it. Meanwhile, DS Katherine Stevens is assigned to a cold murder case and finds that there's more to it than it seems - and that Bancroft has some secrets in her past that may prove difficult to hide. Thriller, starring Sarah Parish, with Faye Marsay, Art Malik and Amara Khan.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A diary and a parking ticket are found at a murder scene in a multi-storey car park. It is not much to go on, but Morse soon links the clues to a crime of passion involving a jealous husband, his wife and her lover. On the personal front, the Oxford detective's feathers are ruffled by a woman he finds himself attracted to. John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Mel Martin and Amanda Hillwood star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot visits a garden fete where he meets the son of an old friend and his fiancee. After having tea with the couple, the sleuth suspects that they are both in danger and Hastings' new interest in photography provides him with the clue to solve a mystery involving cyanide, failing brakes and mixed-up love lives.(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.sub-title: Come on in the Water's Lovely
programme.desc: Rigsby's divorce finally comes through, and he wastes no time in proposing to Miss Jones - but makes the mistake of asking his low-life brother Ron to be best man. Final episode of Eric Chappell's classic comedy, which finally reveals Rigsby's Christian name. Leonard Rossiter stars.(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise makes plans to redecorate. Alec offers Steve £5,000 to leave Vicky alone. Derek worries that everyone is laughing at him behind his back.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill is nervous about meeting Sally. Audrey tells Alma the gossip about Mike and Deirdre having an affair. Vicky has some harsh words for Alec.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles prepare to help Albert give himself up. Kim warns Nick not to cross her again. Frank bides his time before letting Kim know he knows about the affair.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rick and Biff's fight spills out on to the street. Frank tells Zoe that the baby isn't his and that Kim has been having an affair. Eric demands his money back from the Dingles.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A flood of forged banknotes leads the police to believe a fugitive gangster has arrived in Aidensfield, but their efforts to flush him out put Dawson in peril. Meanwhile, Miller tries to remain professional while dealing with his relationship problems and Bernie thinks his favourite celebrity has moved in down the road. Gemma Craven guest stars, with Clare Wille, John Duttine, Peter Benson and Joe McFadden.(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.sub-title: The Happiest Days of Your Life - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Primrose falls for a roofing contractor, while the twins prove too much of a handful for their school, prompting a trip to view the facilities on offer at Brockhurst College. Nostalgic comedy drama, starring David Jason and Pam Ferris.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin gets the chance to play for his college football team - but a cold threatens to earn him an early bath. Flat-share comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Village newcomer Vivienne Mackay is found battered to death in her own kitchen after announcing her intention to marry businessman Dominic Bellingham - who has not yet separated from his current wife. PC Mason is reminded of his own mother's death, and personal feelings threaten to cloud his professional judgement. Dawn seizes an opportunity to make a fast buck using Vince's hot dog van on the day of a big football match but finds herself in cut-throat competition with Peggy and her baked potato operation. Nikki Sanderson and Gwen Taylor star.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe reluctantly agrees to help Frank with his revenge plan. Rachel tell Chris all about Kim's affair. A drunken Zak causes a scene in the Woolpack.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is amazed when Frank tells her he has decided to let her and Dave run the business. Chris confronts Kim about her affair. The Dingle family worry about Zak.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill feels terrible about the gutted kitchen. Alec refuses to say goodbye as Steve and Vicky leave for St Lucia. Deirdre tells Alma that the rumours about her and Mike aren't true.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin isn't happy about having Bill sleep on the sofa. The Duckworths return from Spain to find the inheritance money hasn't arrived. A mysterious parcel arrives at the Wiltons.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.sub-title: The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Village newcomer Vivienne Mackay is found battered to death in her own kitchen after announcing her intention to marry businessman Dominic Bellingham - who has not yet separated from his current wife. PC Mason is reminded of his own mother's death, and personal feelings threaten to cloud his professional judgement. Dawn seizes an opportunity to make a fast buck using Vince's hot dog van on the day of a big football match but finds herself in cut-throat competition with Peggy and her baked potato operation. Nikki Sanderson and Gwen Taylor star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When Hastings and a reluctant Poirot attend a grouse shoot at a friend's estate, one of the hunting party is murdered. Despite suffering a severe cold, the Belgian sleuth is roused from his sickbed to solve the case. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A land dispute escalates during a cowboy fair run by the Wild West Society in the village of Ford Florey. Farmers Jack Fincher and Silas Burbage both claim to own a patch of wasteland known as the Swamp, but Dan Malko wants to buy it and create a travellers' site. Barnaby and Jones are called in when the feud leads to murder during the Wild West-style shoot-outs at the annual event. Guest starring Kenneth Cranham, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Katherine and Joe's relationship progresses, while events take a grisly turn for the Kamara family - forcing Bancroft to offer Daanish a deal. Laura's former husband Tim Fraser is reluctant to help with Laura's cold case, but an unexpected visit changes his mind, and Katherine and Anya make some game-changing discoveries.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A highly respected scientist is murdered just before he is about to deliver a controversial lecture on the environment. It becomes clear he had many enemies within the profession, but Morse's investigations lead him to a killer who is altogether closer to home. Mystery, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Geoffrey Palmer, Cheryl Campbell and George Costigan.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: New tenant Ambrose bamboozles Rigsby by claiming to be a mystic, and soon has the other lodgers under a strange spell. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen faces the consequences of her red mist, as the paramedics attend to Geoff. She arrives at the police station to find Imran waiting for her, having taken a call from Ryan, while in the Rovers, the police question the regulars about Geoff and Yasmeen's relationship.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: An exhausted Yasmeen sits in her police cell while the police search No 6 for evidence, unaware that they are being filmed on Geoff's CCTV. Alya returns from Spain and heads straight to the police station, Gary leaps to Kelly's defence when Dev blames her for heaping so much trouble on Asha, and Adam and Sarah return from their honeymoon.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Imran watches on as a bewildered and upset Yasmeen is charged, while Paul puts pressure on Billy to chuck Kelly out of the flat after discovering her role in sharing Asha's video. Adam learns that Ali has left the area after pleading guilty to assaulting Gary, and David wakes with a start and realises with horror that he's missed Max's speech.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is horrified to learn from Malone that he is planning on arresting Billy and Cain himself, while Dan's adamant he doesn't need any help from Amelia, but when he falls out of his wheelchair it's clear he's not coping. Belle shares a drink at the Woolpack with Jamie, but they're soon joined by a knowing Andrea who tells Jamie she and him need to take a holiday with one another.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will hasn't returned home and Harriet is in the dark over what is going on, while an excited Rishi decides he wants to go camping for his 70th birthday. Priya is disappointed that she has to attend her father's party over spending time with Al, and Belle frets at the thought of Jamie going on holiday with Andrea.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Harriet is angry as Will continues to try to make excuses, while matters between Arthur and Archie get out of hand at Rishi's party, and Vanessa continues with her plans. Wendy is enthusiastic when Victoria leaves her alone with Harry for a brief period, and Dan reveals his fall yesterday has put him back further.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A murder gives rise to rumours of a communist conspiracy. Poirot becomes the centre of attention at the Chelsea Flower Show as he views a rose named in his honour, while Hastings receives a packet of seeds that give him hay fever. Whodunit, guest starring Anne Stallybrass (Heartbeat), with David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An aristocrat goes missing, along with his collection of explicit erotic paintings - and Morse's investigation provides him with a close-up view of the upper crust's dark side. What is more, there is a further culture shock lying in wait - the prospect of working with a new female pathologist. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Amanda Hillwood, Patricia Hodge and Clifford Rose.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The master of a prestigious college asks Morse to investigate the disappearance of one of his colleagues. The subsequent discovery of a dismembered torso soon has everyone fearing the worst - until the missing man turns up alive and well. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, James Grout, Beatie Edney, Sian Thomas and Barry Foster.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods. When local woman Sonia Woodley is stabbed to death in the churchyard two years after the death of her husband, bespoke tailor Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate, and the village begins to reveal its secrets. Detective drama, guest starring James Wilby, Gwyneth Strong and Karl Davies (formerly Emmerdale's Robert Sugden), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham.(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: As Cassie and Sunny continue their investigation into the cold-case murder, the net tightens around the people whose names were found in the victim's diary. Sir Phillip Cross makes a difficult decision to salvage what is left of his reputation while at the same time protecting his family, Father Robert comes clean to the police and Ray returns home to find Lizzie gone. Crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Trevor Eve, Bernard Hill, Tom Courtenay, Ruth Sheen and Brian Bovell.(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Father Robert's revelations prove to have lasting repercussions, especially for Caroline when she goes into premature labour. Bella and Josh deliberate over the best way to deal with their father, the search for Lizzie continues and Maureen is finally able to lay Jimmy to rest. Conclusion of the crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Bernard Hill, Tamzin Malleson, Zoe Telford, Trevor Eve, Tom Courtenay and Tom Austen.(n)

programme.title: Tina & Bobby
programme.desc: Drama about England and West Ham star Bobby Moore's life with his childhood sweetheart Tina Dean, detailing how the pair rose to the dizzy heights of superstardom. In the opening instalment, the 19-year-old insurance office typist agrees to marry the footballer, little knowing that their marriage will be defined by history. Their lives change markedly when the talented player becomes England captain aged just 23. However, when he is diagnosed with cancer Tina proves Bobby's rock as he fights his way back to fitness in a bid to compete in the World Cup of 1966. Lorne MacFadyen and Michelle Keegan star.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The members of an Oxford old boys' cricket team gather for their annual match, unaware that death is waiting at the crease to bowl one of them out for good. Morse sets out to find the culprit - helped as ever by the faithful Lewis, who demonstrates unexpected skill on the pitch. John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Sharon Maughan star in an episode scripted by Oscar-winning director Anthony Minghella.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Du Plessis is hailed as South Africa's answer to Crocodile Dundee as guests arrive at Leopard's Den to watch him in action. However, publicity is the last thing the family wants when pet cheetah Jana runs away from a stunt and has an accident. Meanwhile, a man claiming ownership of a lion demands Danny hand it over - or he will report Jana's injuries to the authorities. Deon Stewardson and Stephen Tompkinson star.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is horrified to learn from Malone that he is planning on arresting Billy and Cain himself, while Dan's adamant he doesn't need any help from Amelia, but when he falls out of his wheelchair it's clear he's not coping. Belle shares a drink at the Woolpack with Jamie, but they're soon joined by a knowing Andrea who tells Jamie she and him need to take a holiday with one another.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will hasn't returned home and Harriet is in the dark over what is going on, while an excited Rishi decides he wants to go camping for his 70th birthday. Priya is disappointed that she has to attend her father's party over spending time with Al, and Belle frets at the thought of Jamie going on holiday with Andrea.(n)

programme.desc: Harriet is angry as Will continues to try to make excuses, while matters between Arthur and Archie get out of hand at Rishi's party, and Vanessa continues with her plans. Wendy is enthusiastic when Victoria leaves her alone with Harry for a brief period, and Dan reveals his fall yesterday has put him back further.(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vicky asks Alec to stop being so nasty. Deirdre tells Mike that she finds Cropper too over-friendly. Derek constructs a trap in his garden to catch the gnome thief.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak is furious when he finds out what Butch and Sam have been up to. Tina is out walking when she is grabbed by a mystery man. Chris and Kim have another argument about Frank.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dave's attempt to make friends with Nick ends in a fight. Dave gives Kim an ultimatum about their future together. Albert returns to the Dingles to face the music with Zak.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An accountant and his family crash into a tractor after being chased down a country lane by another car. Mason is suspicious of them and investigates the incident, discovering they are on the run from a gangster who has arrived in Aidensfield determined to retrieve a set of incriminating documents at any cost. Meanwhile, David buys an old Jeep with a surprising military history. Starring Joe McFadden.(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.sub-title: A Season of Heavenly Gifts - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Pop's hoard of cash causes trouble for the family when Marcus Cope resolves to stop Charley buying the hop garden at any cost. Montgomery is unhappy at naval college and the Brigadier's solution provides a challenge for Pop.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The housemates are put out when Chrissy's mother arrives for an unscheduled visit. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A flood of forged banknotes leads the police to believe a fugitive gangster has arrived in Aidensfield, but their efforts to flush him out put Dawson in peril. Meanwhile, Miller tries to remain professional while dealing with his relationship problems and Bernie thinks his favourite celebrity has moved in down the road. Gemma Craven guest stars, with Clare Wille, John Duttine, Peter Benson and Joe McFadden.(n)

programme.desc: The Dingles prepare to help Albert give himself up. Kim warns Nick not to cross her again. Frank bides his time before letting Kim know he knows about the affair.(n)

programme.desc: Rick and Biff's fight spills out on to the street. Frank tells Zoe that the baby isn't his and that Kim has been having an affair. Eric demands his money back from the Dingles.(n)

programme.desc: Denise makes plans to redecorate. Alec offers Steve £5,000 to leave Vicky alone. Derek worries that everyone is laughing at him behind his back.(n)

PC Mason is reminded of his own mother's death, and personal feelings threaten to cloud his professional judgement. Dawn seizes an opportunity to make a fast buck using Vince's hot dog van on the day of a big football match but finds herself in cut-throat competition with Peggy and her baked potato operation. Nikki Sanderson and Gwen Taylor star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When Hastings and a reluctant Poirot attend a grouse shoot at a friend's estate, one of the hunting party is murdered. Despite suffering a severe cold, the Belgian sleuth is roused from his sickbed to solve the case. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A land dispute escalates during a cowboy fair run by the Wild West Society in the village of Ford Florey. Farmers Jack Fincher and Silas Burbage both claim to own a patch of wasteland known as the Swamp, but Dan Malko wants to buy it and create a travellers' site. Barnaby and Jones are called in when the feud leads to murder during the Wild West-style shoot-outs at the annual event. Guest starring Kenneth Cranham, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Katherine and Joe's relationship progresses, while events take a grisly turn for the Kamara family - forcing Bancroft to offer Daanish a deal. Laura's former husband Tim Fraser is reluctant to help with Laura's cold case, but an unexpected visit changes his mind, and Katherine and Anya make some game-changing discoveries.(n)

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts, featuring a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: The Car Chasers
programme.desc: Jeff sets out to buy a 1970 Camaro, but is put off when the vehicle fails to start. Later, he sees another Camaro on a driveway, and meets an owner with no interest in selling.(n)

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: Featuring the Porsche Taycan and the latest SUV from Lexus.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Fisherman Ali Hamidi is joined by Tom Dove and Neil Spooner to catch buffalo carp in Texas.(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.sub-title: The Big Fish Off: Best Ever Eps
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey head to Thailand with Towie star Ricky Rayment and super-featherweight boxer Mitchell Smith, targeting Mekong catfish, Siamese carp and arapaima.(n)

programme.title: Brothers in Football
programme.desc: Following south London amateur football team Corinthian-Casuals as they travel to Sao Paulo in Brazil to fulfil a tour abandoned 100 years before on the eve of the First World War, facing two-time FIFA Club World Cup-winners SC Corinthians Paulista. The documentary also commemorates the original Corinthian FC, a club credited with popularising the sport around the world.(n)

programme.title: How the West Was Won (1962)
programme.desc: Three generations of a pioneering family experience many ordeals and adventures in their endeavour to build a new life for themselves on the American frontier in the 19th century. Over the years, the family experiences the key events of the nation's history, including the gold rush, the Civil War, and the building of the railroads. Epic Western, starring James Stewart, John Wayne, Gregory Peck, Henry Fonda, Debbie Reynolds, Lee J Cobb and Richard Widmark.(n)

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest entertainment news.(n)

programme.title: The Last Sunset (1961)
programme.desc: A wanted murderer travels to Mexico to see the now-married love of his life, little realising he is being pursued by a determined sheriff. However, both the outlaw and the lawman end up working for the woman's husband on a cattle drive. Western, starring Rock Hudson, Kirk Douglas, Dorothy Malone and Joseph Cotten.(n)

programme.title: Jeremiah Johnson (1972)
programme.desc: A former soldier living a solitary life in the Rocky Mountains is persuaded by US Army troops to help them find a stranded wagon train. Western, starring Robert Redford, Stefan Gierasch and Will Geer.(n)

programme.title: High Plains Drifter (1973)
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger is hired to defend a remote frontier town from three outlaws who are making people's lives a misery. Although he rids the community of the troublemakers, the residents' lives take a turn for the worse as their saviour seizes control of the town and seeks to punish them for their past sins. Western, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood, alongside Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill.(n)

programme.title: Car Crash Global: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: This episode includes the most extreme clips from Russia and Australia, the top five most overloaded vehicles, and the wildest clips involving cyclists.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are trained to act as bodyguards to a Middle Eastern president who is preparing to sign an important peace treaty. Meanwhile, two killers are receiving similar training to prepare them to assassinate him. As their paths cross, the CI5 operatives learn the would-be killers have some useful inside information and share more in common with them than they may have imagined.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa gives Harry a shotgun for his birthday, which he is soon given cause to use when he becomes the target of a manhunt while investigating political blackmail.(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: An important witness to a murder who objects to the Protectors' protection, vanishes soon after she is placed in the Protectors' charge. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A medical student accuses a veteran doctor of covering up the true cause of a homicide, so Quincy intervenes to determine the truth.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Theo discovers his teenage godson has turned to crime, and tries to set him straight - but a gangster hopes to recruit him for a diamond heist. F Murray Abraham guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes involved with a gambler, whose sudden death leaves the dodgy car dealer £2,000 worse off. Meanwhile, Terry helps his old flame Sylvie leave her abusive husband. Billy Connolly guest stars in the vintage comedy drama, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is forced to impose himself on an old girlfriend whose flat is conveniently near a bank that intelligence has revealed is to be raided. Once in position, he and Carter try to pinpoint a radio transmitter that is being used to coordinate the movements of the robbers. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The coroner investigates the death of a college student who drowned during a hazing ritual, leaving his family struggling to cope with their grief.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A desperate boxer falsely accused of murdering his wife takes a priest and two of his parishioners hostage. Theo must stop him hurting anyone while also uncovering the real killer.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A tape implicating two senior police officers in a criminal conspiracy is mistakenly delivered to Daley Videos, and Arthur and Terry find themselves placed in contact with its owner - a local major crime boss. Ian McShane, Rula Lenska, Brian Blessed and Ray Winstone guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: England v Switzerland. A look back at the opening match of the tournament, as the Group A rivals met at Wembley Stadium. After failing to qualify for the 1994 World Cup, England were hosting a major football tournament for the first time since their triumph in the 1966 World Cup, and boasted the attacking talents of Alan Shearer, Teddy Sheringham and Paul Gascoigne. However, they faced a tough task against an organised Swiss outfit.(n)

programme.title: Football's Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Forty years on from the first wave of foreign footballers, this is the story of those pioneering players and their legacy.(n)

programme.title: Van Helsing (2004)
programme.desc: A vampire slayer heads for Transylvania to help a gypsy princess destroy evil bloodsucker Count Dracula and bring his reign of terror to an end. But he must first do battle with a werewolf, Frankenstein's monster and the count's trio of sharp-toothed brides. Gothic action adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Kate Beckinsale, Richard Roxburgh and David Wenham.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan adopts a new identity as an ex-con and goes undercover as a truck driver to expose a gang of ruthless hijackers. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A girl injured in a road accident dies mysteriously in hospital, and Quincy's investigation leads him to some disquieting numbers about emergency room care.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.sub-title: When You Hear the Beep, Drop Dead
programme.desc: Several witnesses overhear a prostitute plotting to murder her lover, but when Theo investigates, he cannot find any trace of the woman in question, or her victim's body.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur panics when he learns that there has been a robbery of safety deposit boxes in the City, so places all his savings in the ancient safe at the lock-up. Unfortunately, they soon catch the eye of an old acquaintance from Marbella. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan becomes romantically involved with a crime journalist. However, when she is implicated in a major crime, her innocence and his professional loyalties are called into question. Carter also wavers, beginning to fear his boss's personal life has shadowed his judgement. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell.(n)

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brother's funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges' thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne.(n)

programme.desc: An eccentric harpoon-wielding bounty hunter is hired by a rancher to dispose of a gang of rustlers bent on revenge for the hanging of one of their henchmen. Western, starring Jack Nicholson, Marlon Brando, Harry Dean Stanton, Randy Quaid, Kathleen Lloyd and Frederic Forrest.(n)

programme.title: Van Helsing (2004)
programme.desc: A vampire slayer heads for Transylvania to help a gypsy princess destroy evil bloodsucker Count Dracula and bring his reign of terror to an end. But he must first do battle with a werewolf, Frankenstein's monster and the count's trio of sharp-toothed brides. Gothic action adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Kate Beckinsale, Richard Roxburgh and David Wenham.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A tape implicating two senior police officers in a criminal conspiracy is mistakenly delivered to Daley Videos, and Arthur and Terry find themselves placed in contact with its owner - a local major crime boss. Ian McShane, Rula Lenska, Brian Blessed and Ray Winstone guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.sub-title: It Could be Practically Anywhere on the Island

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur panics when he learns that there has been a robbery of safety deposit boxes in the City, so places all his savings in the ancient safe at the lock-up. Unfortunately, they soon catch the eye of an old acquaintance from Marbella. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan becomes romantically involved with a crime journalist. However, when she is implicated in a major crime, her innocence and his professional loyalties are called into question. programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Junk and Disorderly

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brother's funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges' thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne.(n)

programme.title: Marriage Boot Camp: Reality Stars

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset when a magazine fails to mention him in an article about the paper he co-wrote with Sheldon. Meanwhile, a power cut at Mrs Wolowitz's home leads to a final family dinner in her honour. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon are invited to speak at UC Berkeley, they decide to take a detour and try to meet one of their idols - Star Wars director George Lucas. Meanwhile, Raj and Amy offer to settle a dispute with a game of table tennis. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard finds out that he has a half-brother, Sheldon and Amy have a platonic sleepover, and Penny gets an offer to audition for a Kevin Smith film. American comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Comic writer and actor Stephen Mangan pays a visit to the cafe at the end of Southend Pier, where Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty recreate one of the best dishes he's ever had, which was while he followed the English cricket team around the world in the Nasser Hussain era. They also deliver a signed cricket bat that Stephen puts to unusual use in the kitchen. Plus, Jamie makes fresh pasta ravioli with delicious radicchio, balsamic, potato and fontina, Jimmy creates the perfect build to cook roast dinner, even when on the move and the duo explore wild British venison.(n)

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer meet up online, and are joined by Lee Ingleby, Alex Horne, Tracy-Ann Oberman, Mo Gilligan, Terry Gilliam, Enter Shikari and the D-Day Darlings.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure introduces clips from the first 138 episodes of the series, plus trivia questions, alternative scenes and out-takes. Featuring the guest voices of Phil Hartman, Buzz Aldrin and Glenn Close.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer forms a bowling team and reluctantly allows Mr Burns to join alongside Moe and Apu. Meanwhile, Bart causes a riot at school by sporting a provocative T-shirt, but as a result the students are forced to wear uniforms.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer fakes his own death to avoid work and ends up meeting his long-lost mother - but Bart and Lisa begin to suspect their new-found granny is keeping something from them. Featuring the guest voices of Glenn Close and Harry Morgan.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob escapes from jail on a mission to destroy television for good, and holds Springfield to ransom with a stolen nuclear warhead. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and R Lee Ermey.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe desperately wants to raise cash to lavish on his new girlfriend, so Homer rashly agrees to help him defraud his car insurance company - but his bumbling attempts to destroy the vehicle put him behind bars. Featuring the guest voice of Helen Hunt.(n)

programme.title: Over the Hedge (2006)
programme.desc: A raccoon trickster is fretting about his debt to a fearsome bear when he stumbles on some animals waking in the woods after their winter nap. Spotting the chance to solve his problem, the raccoon dupes the gullible creatures into stealing food from a nearby suburb so he can give it to the bear - but they fail to realise they will soon be at the mercy of a vermin exterminator. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bruce Willis, Steve Carell, Garry Shandling and William Shatner.(n)

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.sub-title: Channel 4 News With Prime Ministerial Statement
programme.desc: An address to the nation by Boris Johnson.(n)

programme.title: Reasons to Be Cheerful with Matt Lucas
programme.desc: Comedy entertainment show, with the actor and writer celebrating everything that is keeping the Great British public, and some celebrity chums, entertained at home. Special guests appearing in this episode include TV presenter Scarlett Moffatt, actress Morgana Robinson as Natalie Cassidy, Grand Designs host Kevin McCloud, Sooty and Sweep, actress and TV presenter Denise Van Outen, comedians Dawn French and Tom Allen, Olympic gymnast Max Whitlock, newsreader Krishnan Guru-Murthy, comedian Simon Brodkin, radio host Roman Kemp, singer Ronan Keating, and of course, more members of the public.(n)

programme.title: The Fantastical Factory of Curious Craft
programme.desc: Keith Lemon and Anna Richardson host this crafting series in which innovative creatives from across the UK use their artistic talent to produce spectacular makes. In this first episode, former actress and artist Jayne, shop manager Samuel, 3D design graduate Annie and tattoo artist Ann create crafts of epic proportions. In the first task, they make mythical creature puppets in a bid to impress Keith and be picked to go through to create a one-off craft for celebrity client Eamonn Holmes.(n)

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Explorer, conservationist, author and presenter Levison Wood treks alongside hundreds of elephants on their annual migration across Botswana. He gets up close and personal for the first time with a group of orphans and takes part in an ancient ceremony, before setting off into the bush in search of a herd to follow. Following potentially dangerous encounters with a buffalo and a pride of lions, Lev finds his first herd, but is forced to leave them alone when one threatens to charge.(n)

programme.title: Ashes 2005: The Greatest Series
programme.desc: A look back at the memorable five-Test cricket series between England and Australia, which saw England prevail 2-1 to win the urn for the first time since 1987. Featuring interviews with some of the key players, including victorious captain Michael Vaughan, top run-scorer Kevin Pietersen and leading wicket-taker Shane Warne.(n)

programme.title: The Monuments Men (2014)
programme.desc: Seven experts in fine art are assembled into a military platoon during the Second World War, and given an unusual mission. They are sent into occupied Europe to recover priceless works of art that have fallen into Nazi hands and ensure the masterpieces survive the conflict. Fact-based drama, directed by and starring George Clooney. With Matt Damon, Bill Murray and Cate Blanchett.(n)

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Grayson Perry asks people to send in their artworks of animals - whether it be a beloved pet, an abstract or an exotic creature.. Hosting from his art studio, he is joined by Harry Hill and artist Maggi Hambling as he teaches new skills and sees what people have made in isolation.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Car salesman Paul and his partner Sara host first in Sheffield, but their evening is dogged by bickering. Next, glamorous newlyweds Russell and Shane plan an evening of romance, but their loved-up theme falls on deaf ears and their American menu raises a few eyebrows. Finally, kooky Janine and Neil's evening is full of revelations, but Russell and Shane are convinced they have it in the bag.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp are in south-east London with two couples for whom timing is critical. In and around the Isle of Dogs and Greenwich, Lia and Andrew have saved a big deposit and have a sizeable budget of £600,000 to spend. But, after witnessing the crash of 2008, Andrew is nervous of spending his hard-earned money for fear the market will dip. Lucy and Dan live in a B&B and if they don't find somewhere soon their vintage campervan will become their home. Kirstie shows the couple two potential properties, but the third option creates a reaction she isn't expecting and suddenly the search is thrown up in the air.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.desc: Part one of two. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Joining her are tough-talking prison transport officer Tina, dreadlocked farm-dweller Stephen, superior IT manager David and glamorous beauty-school teacher Ashleigh. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?(n)

However, cracks were already beginning to show in the diners' genial facade yesterday, and the hostess realises she must play peacemaker if she is to keep everyone from falling out.(n)

programme.desc: Call centre complaints officer and part-time farmer Stephen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham. programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event.(n)

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines how trains transformed the nation and shaped modern Britain. He begins in the cab of Puffing Billy, the world's oldest-surviving steam locomotive, which was built in 1813 and designed to move coal along a five-mile stretch of track from a Northumberland mine to the docks. Chris also tells the story of Henry Booth, who not only championed George Stephenson's famous Rocket, but also helped finance it, and talks about the work of the navvies who dug the tunnels and laid the tracks.(n)

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The last leg of Tony's round the world adventure begins deep in the Arctic Circle. His first stop is at a Polar Park working with wolves on a fascinating but brave project. Tony then rides the Arctic Circle Train south to the town of Kiruna, on the edge of Swedish Lapland, which is undergoing a very unique transformation as it's being moved building by building to a whole new area. Tony also gets to see behind the scenes at the famous Ice Hotel, a structure which is rebuilt every year from ice taken from the nearby Torne river and ends his journey at Miniature Wonderland - the world's largest model railway.(n)

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.sub-title: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines the role of the railways during the two global conflicts of the 20th century, keeping vital supply lines open and transporting troops to and from the front. In the First World War, railway works were converted into munitions factories and women were employed for these dangerous jobs and their heroic efforts helped win them the vote, while in the Second World War, they were vital in organising the evacuation of a million children and offered underground shelters from air raids.(n)

programme.title: Ian Brady: Monster of the Moors
programme.desc: Documentary originally made to mark half a century since the Moors murderer was sentenced to life imprisonment. Among the contributors are prison officers, detectives, relatives of victims, pen pals and inmates who served time with him. They reveal how Brady showed a psychopathic lack of connection with his crimes.(n)

programme.title: My Dad the Paedophile
programme.desc: Documentary featuring three women, Natasha, Emily and Maya, who were abused at the hands of their own fathers. They discuss how they have created new lives for themselves, and the programme also shows the extent of how the crimes affected other family members.(n)

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters.(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther (1975)
programme.desc: The inept Inspector Clouseau sets out to unmask a notorious international jewel thief believed to be behind the theft of a priceless diamond - but anarchy, as ever, follows wherever he goes. Blake Edwards' comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Christopher Plummer, Catherine Schell, Herbert Lom, Burt Kwouk and Graham Stark.(n)

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter.(n)

programme.title: The Two Faces of January (2014)
programme.desc: A conman masquerades as a tour guide in Greece, and selects a wealthy American tourist and his younger wife as likely targets. However, when a murder is committed at the couple's hotel, all three are incriminated, and a dangerous alliance develops. Thriller based on Patricia Highsmith's novel, starring Viggo Mortensen, Kirsten Dunst and Oscar Isaac.(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher.(n)

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner.(n)

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter (2015)
programme.desc: A medieval warrior thwarts an evil witch queen's plan to wipe out the human race, but is cursed with immortality as a result. In the modern day, he continues to battle evil, and faces his greatest challenge when the sorceress is resurrected to resume her evil plan. Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine.(n)

programme.title: Searching for Ingmar Bergman (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and work of the Swedish film director, presenting key scenes, recurring themes in his films and journeys to the places at the centre of his creative achievements. The film also examines his legacy, featuring interviews with some of his closest collaborators - both in front of and behind the camera.(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community.(n)

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen.(n)

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma (1957)
programme.desc: A farmer in need of money agrees to guard a notorious outlaw until the train arrives to transport him to jail. Meanwhile, the pair are holed up in a hotel, where his prisoner plays mind games with him - and the villain's cohorts are waiting outside ready to engineer an escape. Western adapted from a novel by Elmore Leonard, with Van Heflin, Glenn Ford, Felicia Farr and Leora Dana.(n)

programme.title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971)
programme.desc: A Navy intelligence agent heads to Scotland, where he poses as a marine biologist to investigate the theft of millions of pounds in gold bullion from ships off the British coast. However, the locals counter his enquiries with hostility, especially when he sets his sights on a Greek tycoon, whom he suspects may be operating as a modern-day pirate. Thriller, with Anthony Hopkins, Robert Morley and Jack Hawkins. Based on a novel by Alistair MacLean.(n)

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands (1979)
programme.desc: An English yachtsman sailing round the coast of Germany in 1901 encounters a naval officer who has betrayed his country. Enlisting the aid of a friend, he discovers a plan by Kaiser Wilhelm to invade Britain - which they are the only ones in a position to stop. Spy thriller, starring Simon MacCorkindale, Michael York and Jenny Agutter.(n)

programme.title: The Martian Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Ridley Scott and stars Kate Mara and Chiwetel Ejiofor talk about making the 2015 sci-fi adventure, which stars Matt Damon as an astronaut stranded on Mars.(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan.(n)

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed.(n)

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen (2002)
programme.desc: A boy tries to save his jailbird mother from danger on the streets of a Scottish coastal town, by creating a safe haven where she can escape the grasp of the two men in her life. However, his efforts to raise the necessary funds lead him and his friends into all manner of schemes, and he is soon dangerously out of his depth. Ken Loach's drama, starring Martin Compston, Annmarie Fulton, William Ruane, Michelle Coulter and Gary McCormack.(n)

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A police forensic psychologist searches for the daughter of a senator, who has been kidnapped from her expensive private school by a media-obsessed teacher, sparking a desperate race to hunt down her psychotic and devilishly intelligent captor before it is too late. Thriller prequel to Kiss the Girls, starring Morgan Freeman, Monica Potter, Michael Wincott, Dylan Baker and Penelope Ann Miller.(n)

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris.(n)

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)
programme.desc: An Austrian doctor and his daughter arrive in the dust bowl regions of America after fleeing the Nazis, and join the exodus of farmers seeking fertile land in Oregon. The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie.(n)

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence.(n)

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson.(n)

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen.(n)

programme.title: Sleepless (2017)
programme.desc: Las Vegas cop Vincent Downs steals a 25kg shipment of cocaine from a violent casino boss, whose associates kidnap Downs' teenage son in retaliation. Downs is keen to return the drugs and see his son set free, but is hampered by having to dodge the attentions of an internal affairs officer. Action thriller, starring Jamie Foxx, Dermot Mulroney and Michelle Monaghan.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Andy wants to wow his bride with an alternative, skater-themed wedding, but his fiancee Bobby has always dreamed of being a princess on her big day.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Chris decides to turn his wedding into the ultimate obstacle course, but his fiancee Charlotte dreams of a wedding day filled with family tradition.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teaching assistant Sunita hosts the first of five parties in the West Midlands, hoping an an authentic Punjabi feast will impress guests Liz, Digby, George and Tutsi.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, half-Egyptian property investor Liz treats her guests to a taste of the Middle East and some startling revelations.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night of the competition taking place in the West Midlands, male model George treats his guests to a mixture of Greek, Caribbean and Italian food.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, social worker Tutsi serves up a mixture of Zimbabwean and English dishes. One of Tutsi's guests harbours a grudge about some of her previous comments, while some close-to-the-bone nicknames are thrown around the table and there's a very mixed reaction to a surprise worm-eating competition.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in the West Midlands, dark horse Digby plans to surprise his guests with an evening of fancy fine dining. However, Digby's biggest challenge proves to be maintaining harmony between his guests, with George still upset with Sunita for dissing his food and with straight-talking Tutsi trying to pay Liz a compliment which is misinterpreted.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry seeks fresh inspiration when he loses his standing as a champion athlete at school and attempts to introduce a new sport to his friends. Murray refuses to let Beverly help out at the furniture shop when sales take a nosedive, but she's convinced the latest home furnishing craze holds the answer.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As they bond over their shared love for the movie Dirty Dancing, Beverly is thrilled when Erica suggests the film as the theme for the upcoming school dance. However, Principal Ball refuses to sanction anything with the word 'dirty' in the title, threatening Erica with suspension if she persists with the idea. Barry lobbies for the dance to be based on his favourite movie Footloose, while Adam and Pops encourage Murray to learn to dance in order to make Beverly happy.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice. Meanwhile, Erica and Geoff try to hide the fact that they are living together.(n)

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Principal Glascott and Lainey struggle to agree on what is an appropriate dress code. Elsewhere, Coach Mellor struggles with his relationship with Julie.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster makes a scientific breakthrough at the dentist's office. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino and Georgie makes a big mistake when he is left in charge of the store.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny discovers she has a dedicated group of fans from her Serial Ape-ist days when she accompanies Leonard to a comic-con. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch at Penny's flat, and stress over the baby's arrival prompts Howard to make an impulsive purchase.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back.(n)

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Kate and Sophie must reconcile with their past, Mary grapples with the fate of the Kane family as Catherine seeks Jacob's help, while Alice is in on yet another nefarious plan.(n)

programme.title: Misfits
programme.desc: A series of threatening messages leaves the teenagers worried that someone knows their secret, and Nathan discovers his mother's boyfriend sleeping outside in the nude. Curtis and Alisha continue their flirting, while Simon meets a mysterious girl on the internet, who shows an interest in his videos. Comedy drama, starring Lauren Socha, Nathan Stewart-Jarrett, Iwan Rheon, Antonia Thomas and Robert Sheehan.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides two more singletons on the dating show based naked attraction alone. First into the studio is 26-year-old Adele from Scotland. After beating cancer, Adele wants to live life to the full and find a guy who feels the same. She is followed by 22-year-old Jack from Manchester. After a dramatic four-stone weight-loss, Jack wants to show off his new body and attract the one for him.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?(n)

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Sam and Castiel track down a Shaman who may be able to help a friend. Nick continues to spiral down a dark path as he looks for answers surrounding the deaths of his wife and son.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Kate and Sophie must reconcile with their past, Mary grapples with the fate of the Kane family as Catherine seeks Jacob's help, while Alice is in on yet another nefarious plan.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff accidentally hits Audrey in the face after they swap sides in bed, which results in a trip to the hospital. Adam makes friends with his noisy neighbour and Timmy realises how awful Russell is while running an errand for him.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina decides to make some big changes in her life, starting with moving away from home to attend college full time - but it is not long before she discovers being a student has its drawbacks. Melissa Joan Hart stars.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Zelda accepts a position as associate professor at the college, much to the dismay of independently minded niece Sabrina, who desperately wants to leave her old life behind. Elsewhere, Sabrina casts a spell to speed herself up.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe accidentally injures Austin during a game of pool, foiling his plan for a romantic weekend away with Mel. Meanwhile, a home-schooled student begins studying with Ryder, but the new arrangement soon turns sour.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Austin have different opinions about whether or not to have children, while Joe is confused when his new girlfriend tell him that she only wants a physical relationship with no other commitments. Plus, Lennox enlists Ryder's help when she struggles to write her college admissions essay. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

Jean-Luc Bilodeau stars.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben feels guilty about leaving Emma at home when he heads out on a date, and can only think about his little girl. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to take over care of the child, believing the men are not responsible enough, leaving Riley to persuade her otherwise.(n)

programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica decides to put college on hold and pursue her dream of becoming a pop singer - which causes her parents no end of stress. Meanwhile, an April Fools' Day prank leads to an all-out war between Adam and Barry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Jeff Garlin and Hayley Orrantia.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords believes the Pontiac Bandit is up to his old tricks and stealing cars again, but Peralta is convinced he's wrong and attempts to prove it. The rest of the squad battles to keep Shaw's bar a police hangout after some firefighters stake their claim to it.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz work and rework a crime scene in their efforts to solve a difficult murder case that is clouded by confusing evidence. However, their sympathy for the mourning mother of the victim leads them to make unrealistic promises to her.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Mel is excited about the prospect of spending Christmas with her sister Meredith, who is on a home visit from prison. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to help Adam navigate a painless path through puberty, but just as his voice is changing, he is cast in the lead role of the school musical. programme.title: The Goldbergs

Gogglebox star and TV presenter Scarlett Moffatt is hoping that martial arts fighter Tommy will prove to be full of banter and happy to see her 'without her fake tan on'. Entrepreneur Jo Wood seeks someone who shares her love of a good time, while Britain's Got Talent winner Ashleigh Butler hopes fellow dog-lover Elliot will live up to her - and Pudsey's - expectations.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Single mum Tracy from Bedfordshire has been out of the dating game since she split with her fiancee three years ago and hopes to find a man who matches her adventurous side, while London sales adviser Matthew, 24, is tired of dating apps and thinks online profiles mean girls never actually see the real him. Anna Richardson hosts.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
