programme.desc: Rick Edwards is joined by the stars of the reality show as they come together to set the record straight on some of the most talked-about scenes of the third series, which saw the Chelsea residents travelling to Dubai and Italy.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched in early November, 2015, including SAS: Who Dares Wins, The Great Pottery Throw Down, The Hunt, University Challenge, Antiques Roadshow and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes. Narrated by Caroline Aherne.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: DJ Gordon is looking for a man to share his life with and on paper, kickboxing instructor Stephen seems like the perfect partner. Will they get on in real life? Former ballroom dancer David hopes to sweep Zoe off her feet, Paul and Samantha share a dry wit, and keen baker Holly helps fitness fanatic Ben - who had an awkward meal in the last series - to confront his fear of carbs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina decides to make some big changes in her life, starting with moving away from home to attend college full time - but it is not long before she discovers being a student has its drawbacks. Melissa Joan Hart stars.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Zelda accepts a position as associate professor at the college, much to the dismay of independently minded niece Sabrina, who desperately wants to leave her old life behind. Elsewhere, Sabrina casts a spell to speed herself up.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina realises she has been turning down guys left and right since her breakup with Harvey, she casts a spell ensuring that she will say 'yes' every time she is asked out.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina runs into her evil twin Katrina, who steals her Other Realm passport and visits the mortal world to wreck her life by doing terrible things to her friends and family.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder is upset when he discovers his friends have deleted him from their profiles on social media websites, and Lennox is determined to beat Zander's test scores. Meanwhile, Joe begins to date Mel's high-maintenance friend Anita (Shannon Elizabeth). Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel desperately tries to act like a cool aunt after discovering that Lennox and Zander have taken their relationship to the next level, but Joe just wants to kill the boyfriend. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Keira is impressed by his undeserved bad boy reputation, but her parents are not. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker take baby Emma for a doctor's appointment, and Ben decides to ask a nurse at the surgery out on a date. Danny prepares for his first hockey game with the New York Rangers, and his superstitious rituals include carrying an old high-school jersey that has never been washed to the event. However, things go wrong when Tucker accidentally launders the lucky jersey. Comedy, starring Derek Theler.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: The guys appreciate Bonnie's help, but struggle to cope when she begins to turn up at the flat unexpectedly. Ben and Danny decide to take baby Emma over to Riley's place, but end up sabotaging her latest date. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has a birthday sleepover, during which his friend Garry shares out some of his father's home-brewed beer and makes everyone sick. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica want a new CD player, but Murray tells them he will only buy one for them if they write the greatest song ever.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Zander asks Lennox to work with him on a creative project, despite the fact their relationship is currently on hold. Meanwhile, Mel believes it is a good idea for her and Joe to take their new relationship slowly - but he upsets her when he gets another job and moves out of the house. Family comedy starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel becomes frustrated when Joe's demanding new job prevents the pair spending time together. She sneaks over to see him at work, but runs the risk of getting him fired. Meanwhile, Ryder witnesses a robbery and discovers that his interview with the local news team has been turned into a video that has gone viral. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker are keen to throw Bonnie out of the building when she sets up her new apartment across the hall from the boys, and decide to throw a huge, noisy party to annoy her. Meanwhile, Danny asks Riley for advice on how to split with Milena, but winds up in a compromising position. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Melissa Peterman.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Against Bonnie's advice, Ben persuades Danny to sign a sponsorship deal with a company that makes a brand of energy drink - but things go wrong at a photoshoot. Meanwhile, Riley takes an interest in volunteering and accepts a job helping out at the hospital. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Desperate circumstances call for desperate measures as Peralta, Captain Holt, Santiago, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle are forced to ally themselves with some old enemies.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam goes to great lengths to dodge swimming classes, but his plan to avoid the sport could affect his friendship with Dave. Jealousy prompts Barry to undermine Erica when she attempts to make the world a better place by forming a school social awareness club.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray grows a moustache, it ignites a feud between his wife Beverly and his best friend Bill. Barry is convinced that he's lost Lainey's affections when Erica tells him that his girlfriend is in love with Culture Club singer Boy George. David Koechner guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Abz Love hosts the second of the week's dinner parties with a little help from his mother, hoping to impress guests Jack Fincham, Dani Harmer, Mark Francis and Donna and Verona.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy is back - and this time things between him and Jake are personal. Amy and Charles try to find the perfect new vending machine for the Nine-Nine.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys' image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. When the friends arrive in the West End, their efforts to appear cool are hampered by aggressive bouncers, a tramp and some angry bus passengers.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin, Clare, Michelle, Orla and James are beside themselves with excitement as they have tickets to see boyband Take That in Belfast. When Ma Mary forbids them to go, they decide that they will stop at nothing to get there and see their idols in concert. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Nicola Coughlan, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland and Dylan Llewellyn.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns cause uproar at a family wedding, and when the girls - and James - fail to behave themselves at the reception, the consequences are very serious indeed, especially for poor cousin Eammon (played by guest star Ardal O'Hanlon). Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Nicola Coughlan, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland and Dylan Llewellyn.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Moss decides his life is stagnating and enrols on a German cookery course to meet new people. Elsewhere, Jen discovers the only place she can have a cigarette is in a smoking area that bears a sinister resemblance to Soviet Russia. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Richard Ayoade and Katherine Parkinson.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen finds love in the form of Peter, and prepares a dinner party to introduce him to six of their single friends. Unfortunately, the three male guests drop out at the last minute, leaving her facing an awkward choice between cancelling or drafting in Moss, Roy and Richmond as replacements. Sitcom, starring Richard Ayoade, Chris O'Dowd and Katherine Parkinson, with Noel Fielding and Sarah Hadland.(n)

programme.title: River Cottage Bites
programme.desc: Head gardener Mark Diacono provides a step-by-step guide to planning a vegetable patch, and shows how people can save money by growing their own produce, expanding their culinary horizons and providing the freshest produce around.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend join forces to tackle Tim's very own 1965 Ford Mustang, preparing for a road trip around Britain revisiting a few of their favourite cars from across the last four series. En route, they stop off at some top petrolhead pitstops, and there's a chance to enjoy unseen footage and outtakes from across the series, including a chat with actor Roger Moore.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw work on a 1971 Fiat Dino coupe for an ex-mechanic who had to put the restoration of the vehicle on hold when he was diagnosed with a rare type of cancer. During the process, Tim takes a drive in one of the most beautiful cars in the world and Fuzz gets his hands on a Ferrari racing engine for the first time.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car-fan Tony's 1962 Jaguar Mark 2 has been in his family for well over 40 years. Due to complications following a stomach operation, he hasn't been able to restore the car himself and it has been sitting neglected in a garage for nearly two decades. With Fuzz Townshend battling to start the Jag's engine and Tim Shaw having to get his hands dirty making parts, it's a race against the clock to get this British classic finished on time.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In 2010, new parents Mary and David were looking for a home close to her sister in Cambridgeshire, while Mary's mother and father, Edna and George, were seeking out a property in the same area, hoping to live near to their children and grandchildren. Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with the family to find out whether they were able to meet the requirements of everyone involved.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp catch up with two couples who were looking for family homes for life. Sunee and Will were desperate to put down permanent roots in London near Sunee's relatives, while Alison and Phil were swapping the buzz of Bolton for rural Herefordshire.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex. The guests worry about uncomfortable sleeping arrangements, the price of accommodation and the strict 9pm curfew - and the prospect of a dance-style workout only exacerbates their bad mood.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William Cheeseman, owners of five-star Gold-rated 38 St Giles in Norwich, try to impress their competitors. Unfortunately, poor breakfast presentation and complaints about noise from the street increase the tension between the couple as they strive for perfection.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ann and Bill Clay play host at their four-star Bosvean House B&B in Bude, Cornwall. Diane and Max Seivewright query the establishment's luxury description, while Galia Grainger complains about the lack of a sea view. However, the hosts hope an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a stick dance and a drink in their garden shed will succeed in winning over the guests.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Village bakers Diane and Max Seivewright, the owners of Ombersley B&B in Worcestershire, host the last round of the competition, but some guests are far from impressed with the rooms and food.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners gather to find out who has won the competition. Diane and Max Seivewright, the hosts at Ombersley B&B, feel betrayed by Ann and Bill Clay's feedback and want to know why they have been so harshly criticised, while Galia Grainger asks why Slimmeria's rules and regulations have provoked so much hostility.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sex and the City fan Jose Stewart hosts the first dinner party in Lincolnshire for teacher Skip Schultz, tattooist Indy Nijjar, entrepreneur Sharon Wright and admin worker Jessica Carroll, but struggles to concentrate on her Spanish-themed menu, opting instead to spend her time on Twitter. A game of truth or dare then brings out some interesting revelations, as well as an unlikely romantic encounter.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: History teacher Skip Schultz hosts the second party in Lincolnshire, planning an evening to celebrate his American roots. While the guests are impressed with the starter, the main course proves a confusing flop, and Skip has to rely on his entertainment to save the day.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Sharon Wright hosts Lincolnshire's third party, hoping to impress with dishes of seared scallops, crispy-top pork belly, and chocolate praline tart, which she has repeatedly practised in preparation for the evening. The businesswoman has a strict schedule and has considered her guests' every need, even hiring a gardener to ensure the yard is in full bloom.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tattoo artist Indy Nijjar hosts a summer-themed dinner party in Lincolnshire, instructing his guests to bring swimwear with them. In a last-ditch bid to score high marks, he decides to serve his dessert in a unique place, but will have to wait and see whether it is enough to win the £1,000 prize.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Admin worker Jessica Carroll hosts the final party in Lincolnshire. Despite demonstrating a distinct lack of culinary knowledge over the course of the week, including asking teacher Skip Schultz if his pumpkin pie contained pumpkin, she hopes her Chinese meal and unusual pet will impress the guests.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a project to renovate and extend a classic 1920s cinema in Thorne, South Yorkshire. With little knowledge of restoration, Gwyn and Kate boldly set about turning the dilapidated building into a family home using masses of concrete after taking advice from an architect friend. The couple are hoping to create a hydraulic glass wall that opens up one side of the house to form a UV-filtered canopy, and there are also plans for a white roof extension that resembles a diving board.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treating a woman with brittle bone disease end up with another patient on their hands. A man collapses at the side of the road, but refuses to go to hospital.(n)

programme.title: Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital
programme.desc: Three families dealing with difference at Birmingham Children's Hospital, including 17-year-old Tijana, who was born with eyes that are unusually small and has reduced vision. First-time parents Charlotte and Dan have just had baby Lily, who was born with a cleft lip and palate, and against their protective instincts, they are putting her forward for corrective surgery at just six weeks old. Meanwhile, rock fan 14-year-old Ellie and her dad Gary bring their own unique energy to the Emergency Department, but Ellie's mood is volatile as she battles feelings of depression.(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: With more than 88,000 under-18s arrested in 2016 in the UK, this edition focuses on how Wiltshire police are dealing with an increase in young people challenging their authority. Are young people being given too many chances or not enough?(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to A&E after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St George's after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Liam, 31, is rushed to St George's after collapsing at home after his fourth epileptic seizure of the day, and he experiences another at the hospital, while 89-year-old Mair is brought to A&E with severe chest pain and difficulty breathing and doctors take blood samples to test whether her symptoms are due to pneumonia. Twelve-year-old Lauren arrives by ambulance after breaking her leg while scoring a try in a rugby match and she needs extensive surgery to give her the best chance of walking normally again.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treating a woman with brittle bone disease end up with another patient on their hands. A man collapses at the side of the road, but refuses to go to hospital.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A sense of dread descends on Craggy Island as the priests prepare for poker-faced Father Stone's annual visit - and Ted tries desperately to think of a scheme to get rid of him. Clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Chagford Show, Devon, where she enters her home-made elderflower cordial in the garden crafts competition.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Alan and Ruth Jones want to buy two houses - one in Murcia, south-eastern Spain, where they hope to enjoy a few years of adventure, and another in Exeter. Presenters Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamiliton take them around a number of properties in the hopes of finding their new dream homes.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in people's homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB test run the orangery as a new events space by hosting their A Midsummer Night's Dream-themed party for a group of friends visiting from the UK. In the south of France, Tim and Sasha set out to turn their chateau's original bathing pool - which has sat empty for 15 years - into a unique feature for a new wellness garden. Plus, Fiona unveils a plaque and hosts a party to celebrate her chateau's 845th birthday. To ensure the drinks are served at the right temperature, she transforms one of the chateau's old dungeons into the perfect wine cellar.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Tamasin and Andy Jarrett, who hope to build a modern family home in the middle of a Kent conservation area, but they prove reluctant to take on any new ideas.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Rooms 36 in the Lake District, owned by health-conscious Andy Peters, who is joined by his friend, fellow B&B owner Jeronime Palmer.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son team Trish and Connor Richardson host at the Red Lion Coaching Inn in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, where Julie and James are not impressed by the dated bathrooms.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julie and James host at the Schiehallion Hotel in Aberfeldy, where the guests are impressed by their rooms, but once again luxury lovers Andy and Jeronime want more from their beds.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Townhead Hotel in Lockerbie, Dumfries and Galloway, owned by Stephen Montgomery, where the high level of finish in the rooms surprises all of the guests.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Jeronime from Rooms 36 want to find out why their luxury B&B didn't hit the mark as the B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Henry Cole visit a motorbike fan, making table lamps from engines and turning a pallet and iron wheels into a stylish modern coffee table.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the White Horse Inn in Maldon, Essex, where owners Jayne and Pete Kocinoga hope their attention to detail will win over their guests.(n)

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offer recipes, tips and hacks tailored for the Covid-19 outbreak, featuring a super-flexible, quick green pasta, chicken pot pie and a comforting giant vegetable rosti.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree meet Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca, who have devised a scheme to transform their aviary into a boutique brocante shop.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jonathan Broom and his wife Deborah have put everything on hold while he pursues his dream of building a miniature Hollywood Hills-style mansion. They stumble across a scrap of land in north London, but it's fraught with problems and the only way they can complete the £1million home is by sinking half of it six metres below ground. Surrounded on all sides by their neighbours' back gardens, the couple have to dismantle walls and fences and promise to put them back together again, and that's just the start of their difficulties. Kevin McCloud follows their progress.(n)

programme.title: How to Build
programme.sub-title: How to Build British: The London Cab
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: The return of the documentary charting how the Axis powers built some of the biggest and deadliest pieces of military hardware in history. This edition examines the Battle of Saipan in 1944 and Japan's warrior mindset, a metaphysical megastructure that made its infantry so formidable during conflicts in the Pacific during the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and David O'Doherty compete against Jon Richardson and Natasia Demetriou. John Kearns joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan orders Ted and Dougal to campaign against a controversial film - but as a result of their protest it becomes the biggest box-office hit in Craggy Island's history. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: TV personality Henry Sellers arrives to judge an all-priest version of Stars in Their Eyes, prompting intense rivalry between the star-struck Craggy Island clerics and their Rugged Island counterparts. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan.(n)

programme.title: How to Build
programme.sub-title: How to Build British: The London Cab
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab.(n)

programme.desc: The return of the documentary charting how the Axis powers built some of the biggest and deadliest pieces of military hardware in history. This edition examines the Battle of Saipan in 1944 and Japan's warrior mindset, a metaphysical megastructure that made its infantry so formidable during conflicts in the Pacific during the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to the Spanish city of Seville to look for the mysterious ingredient that gives marmalade its bitter tang, while Kate Quilton meets an entrepreneur who has developed an ecosystem that could revolutionise the future of fish farming. Matt Tebbutt hits the streets to see how billy goat meat goes down with the British public.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enters the shortbread competition at the Chagford Show in Devon, as she tries to woo the judges with some creative takes on the classic treat, including using rosemary and lavender as ingredients.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Grant and Francesca Crofton have a two-year-old son and would like to expand their family further. This means they need more space, but should this be in Leeds - where they live now - or Treviso in Italy, where Francesca comes from? Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin help the couple weigh up their options.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien come across a water trough and a cartwheel as they continue their mission to turn unwanted items into hard cash.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree meet Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca, who have devised a scheme to transform their aviary into a boutique brocante shop.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Devon with Graham and Nicky Daniel, who are building an ambitious contemporary home on a woodland site, and are planning to tackle much of the work themselves.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Meudon Hotel in Falmouth, Cornwall, where owner Gaye Woods hopes to impress rivals Tim and Mikey, Joan and Geoff, and Sue and Chris.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Malborough in Devon and The Royal Oak pub, run by laid-back owner Tim Heap, and the basic rooms are a hit for some, while others question the cleanliness.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Angel Guest House in Tiverton, Devon, where owners Chris and Sue Holliday have created a homespun experience.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Expectations are high as the guests arrive at the Compton Swan in Berkshire, after co-owner Joan McGowan revealed she was named Ireland's Businesswoman of the Year.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head east to Newark in search of their latest upcycling prospects. Simon finds an antique European threshing board, which he turns into a coffee table, and Henry's all at sea with a ship's porthole.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Barnfield B&B in St Osyth, Essex, run by Christine and Paul, where as well as offering rooms, Christine also runs spiritual retreats.(n)

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offer recipes, tips and hacks tailored for the Covid-19 outbreak, including cheesy veggie quesadillas for all the family, some easily-adaptable recipes for meat loaf and a chicken noodle stir-fry.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree give a magnificent five-metre-high staircase a makeover with help from design experts Dorothy and Arthur. Tim and Rebecca start creating a two-bedroomed guest gîte in a derelict outbuilding and host a group of international guests for an autumnal flower arranging weekend, while Cheshire couple Steve and Angela get windswept as they revamp their poolside al fresco kitchen.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Commercial architect Martin Walker and his art-director wife Kae want to build the ultimate family home near York, inspired by a giant farm shed. However, her idea for a warm and cosy design conflicts dramatically with his penchant for building large square warehouses, and finding something they both agree on proves extremely challenging on their tight budget. Kevin McCloud follows the couple's progress.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treating a woman with brittle bone disease end up with another patient on their hands. A man collapses at the side of the road, but refuses to go to hospital.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A fully relocatable polar research station in Antarctica, which was inspired by a revolutionary icebreaking ship and ingenious designs for pre-fabricated buildings.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.desc: An exploration of the Harz Mountain Railway in Germany - Europe's longest rail network - which still uses steam locomotives and has a murky, hidden past.(n)

programme.title: Wonders of the Monsoon
programme.desc: Exploring the relationship that has developed over thousands of years between the people who live in monsoon regions and the wildlife they share them with. In the rice paddies of Assam, India, farmers battle a herd of hungry elephants over their crops, while on the Philippine island of Palawan, near Borneo, people still hunt in the forest and live in caves for part of the year. The programme also looks at the impact of organised religion, meeting members of the Bishnoi sect who believe that all life is sacred and have even been known to lay down their lives to protect trees. Colin Salmon narrates.(n)

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Efforts to preserve the marine life of the region, which is home to the world's richest coral reefs and an array of species, including whales, sharks, albatross and tuna. Despite millions of people relying on its fish stocks, the seas have very little protection and face various threats, with international fishing fleets taking a disastrous toll. Benedict Cumberbatch narrates.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: Documentary exploring unusual rail networks from around the world, beginning with a look at trains in cities, including an inverted monorail in Wuppertal, Germany. With contributions from Susana Esteves da Fonseca.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The people responsible for tracking down war criminals who had evaded capture, beginning with the US army task force in charge of locating German scientists.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How Japan's early victories over Allied forces during the Second World War convinced its people that their strength and discipline would bring them victory. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of the Vajont Dam in the mountains of northern Italy, and the catastrophic flood in 1963 that caused the deaths of 2000 people.(n)

He also samples the buffet on a bullet train, discovers why Okinawa is embracing American fast food, and visits the ancient capital of Kyoto, where he attempts to develop a taste for tofu.(n)

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Explorer, conservationist, author and presenter Levison Wood treks alongside hundreds of elephants on their annual migration across Botswana. He gets up close and personal for the first time with a group of orphans and takes part in an ancient ceremony, before setting off into the bush in search of a herd to follow. The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach.(n)

programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael finally hope to move into their chateau so they can host a hen party, although the kitchen's unfinished. In the Loire Valley, Paul and Karen rent out their chateau as a holiday gite hoping to attract more guests by creating an office in an old water tower. Meanwhile, Dick and Angel try to keep costs down when shopping for baths.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mette and Chris from Brighton want a holiday home on Majorca, so Scarlette Douglas lines up five properties for them and their two children on the north coast of the island.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend travel to Leicestershire to rescue a Jaguar E-Type. After ill health turned school caretaker Mick's dream of owning one the 1960s supercars into a nightmare, the team is on hand to get the iconic car back on the road.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, where straight-talking farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and friend Anny Harrison run a tight ship.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The dinner-party challenge returns with a week of programmes from in and around Essex, with events planner Natalie hosting the first night and hoping her homely menu will impress guests Alison, Amarinder, Donia and Dean.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in north Somerset show off their culinary and hosting skills, Norman and Dee kick things off with an Indian menu that proves too spicy for their guests, followed by young lovebirds Ashley and Sophie - although Ashley lets the side down with an un-ironed shirt. Finally, self-styled funnyman Brett and his wife Vicky end the week with an American menu.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray impulsively agrees to start sharing the children's washing facilities so that Debra can have the bathroom to herself - but soon regrets acting so hastily. Ray Romano stars, with Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray happily befriend a new couple - whose annoying eight-year-old son Spencer insists on making a nuisance of himself. Ray Romano stars.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier search for a wealthy patron prepared to give their old school a much-needed cash injection, and soon find the ideal candidate - Martin's new girlfriend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce, with Barbara Babcock (Hill Street Blues).(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Self-important 'corkmaster' Niles arranges a boycott of Frasier's new radio show on wine appreciation, while Martin struggles to escape the powerful clutches of his new physiotherapist - until he samples her delicious cooking. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Chris and Kay from Buckinghamshire are searching for their perfect retirement home to share with their two cats. The only hitch is that they can't agree on where it should be. Kay loves the stunning scenery of Cardigan Bay in west Wales, while sun-worshipper Chris would rather move to the beautiful Mar Menor in Spain. Jasmine Harman selects three properties for their £150,000 budget in Wales, but Jonnie Irwin has three cracking options in the Mar Menor.(n)

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Sharon and Shaun Garner show a Bognor Regis couple round three high-end luxury villas in Almeria, while a part-time English teacher is looking for a holiday home in Alicante.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with two couples who knew exactly where they wanted to live. Katrina and Nick were looking for their first place together as a couple on the small but pricey island of Jersey, while Helen and Rick had a search area of just four square miles in the popular Manchester suburbs of Hale and Altrincham, where they were hoping to find a family home.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including EastEnders. This Morning, Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, The Sex Clinic, Hunted, the news featuring Harvey Weinstein and Netflix hit The Stranger.(n)

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Explorer, conservationist, author and presenter Levison Wood treks alongside hundreds of elephants on their annual migration across Botswana. He gets up close and personal for the first time with a group of orphans and takes part in an ancient ceremony, before setting off into the bush in search of a herd to follow. Following potentially dangerous encounters with a buffalo and a pride of lions, Lev finds his first herd, but is forced to leave them alone when one threatens to charge.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: Only seven of the 12 famous faces remain at the derelict farmstead in the Inner Hebrides, where chief instructor Ant Middleton and his team of Foxy, Billy, Ollie and Jay are putting them through their paces. They face a daunting 48 hours devised to expose the weakest members of the group - including an arduous beach exercise in near freezing water and a gruelling race across mountainous terrain with heavy packs. The pressure builds and leads to high drama, resulting in further departures from the course.(n)

programme.title: Ashes 2005: The Greatest Series
programme.desc: A look back at the memorable five-Test cricket series between England and Australia, which saw England prevail 2-1 to win the urn for the first time since 1987. Featuring interviews with some of the key players, including victorious captain Michael Vaughan, top run-scorer Kevin Pietersen and leading wicket-taker Shane Warne.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets entrepreneur Paul Wilkinson and his wife Amy, who are building a giant new home on a 16-acre plot in Lincolnshire. The superstructure will be comprised of five circular buildings made up of interlocking timber cylinders, linked by raised wooden walkways that hang over a fishing lake. The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach.(n)

programme.desc: Robert becomes convinced he has found the perfect woman, but Ray witnesses something that makes him think otherwise. Brad Garrett and Ray Romano star.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad, beginning with Cath and her daughter Kate looking for a tranquil holiday home along the Costa Almeria in southern Spain. Cath wants enough space for her family to be able to visit, but she also wants somewhere to escape the rat race and find inspiration for her writing. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?(n)

He also pays a visit to a sumo wrestling stable, where he bakes flatbreads for the fighters and sits down to dinner with the largest fighter in the history of the sport. programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Rose makes one of her dramatic balcony entrances, interrupting Charlie's romantic evening with Michelle. She proceeds to reveal that she is about to get married, prompting Alan and his long-suffering brother to crash the event. However, things are not quite what they seem.(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Clues That Caught the Killer: Sadie Hartley
programme.desc: Documentary examining the vital breakthroughs that helped police catch the killers of 60-year-old Sadie Hartley, who was immobilised with a stun gun and stabbed to death in her own home in January 2016. Detectives quickly identified two suspects, but only patient and thorough police work could uncover the evidence to secure a conviction.(n)

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.sub-title: Swinging Both Ways: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary explores the lives of straight sex workers who have turned their heterosexual predilections upside down to perform in gay roles for money. A cammer and porn star reveal what it takes to sell sex to fellow performers of the same gender, despite being straight in their private lives.(n)

programme.title: Murder in Paradise
programme.desc: A series of true crime documentaries, starting with the story of British millionaire Andy Bush, who was murdered when he went on a holiday to Spain. The documentary examines new evidence surrounding the case, featuring CCTV footage, police records and insightful testimonies, and also looks at the involvement of his obsessive ex-girlfriend, who was implicated in his murder.(n)

programme.title: Airport 24/7: Thailand
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Phuket International Airport's fire brigade, and Max from Russia, a strict fruitarian who cannot board his flight as he has chosen to not wear any shoes.(n)

programme.title: Airport 24/7: Thailand
programme.desc: Long-suffering customs officer Pui has a hard time trying to explain the prohibited goods rule to a passenger who is trying to bring a box of illegal fruit into Thailand.(n)

programme.title: Airport 24/7: Thailand
programme.desc: It is safety training day for Phuket International Airport's fire brigade, while Ebony from Australia arrives in Phuket to undergo a second breast augmentation procedure.(n)

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when the Big Giant Head switches Sally's body with Dick's. Harry and Tommy are intimidated by a couple of tough-looking guys who spend a lot of time at the bar.(n)

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.sub-title: Opposites Attract - Part Three: Night of the Locust
programme.desc: Part three of three. Jim falls for PTA member Ms McKenna, Bridget is emotionally torn about her feelings for Jeremy, and Kerry is outraged to discover provocative dancing has been banned from the school formal. Guest starring Tatum O'Neal (Rescue Me).(n)

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: Jim's wife leaves him and Kerry annoys Bridget by dyeing her hair blonde. Meanwhile, the family therapist convinces Cate that she should pursue her dream of becoming a singer.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael goes camping with Kady and her friends, while Clare and Tony plan to sneak out to a rave. Starring Damon Wayans.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael resorts to bribing his family in an effort to get time alone in the house, giving Claire money to go shopping and watch a video with Kady. However, a power cut soon jeopardises his chance for solitude. Starring Damon Wayans.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired couple in a seaside village in Norfolk battle with their non-paying tenant living in the flat above them, so they ask eviction expert Paul to help. Blackpool lettings agent John comes up against a hard drug user who is attracting antisocial wrongdoers to the bedsits that John runs, while in Leicestershire, Sharon battles to reclaim a property from a former friend who is close to £3,500 in arrears with rent.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary following the inhabitants of the seaside village of Jaywick in Essex, where more than half of the residents are on state welfare. Tony Taylor claims £51.40 a week and does odd jobs in exchange for food, enabling his benefits money to go a bit further, while Claire has moved from east London's Canning Town in search of a better life with her fiance Luke, their young baby and her two older children, who live with a host of pets in a two-bedroom house.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Karl and Susan worry about Elly, and Paul's attempts to mend bridges suffer a setback when he goes to Susan's aid instead of taking Harlow's assignment to school.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: John tries to convince Marilyn to take him back, but she doesn't feel the same. Ziggy is happy to see Marco charming himself into Ben's good books, though Maggie is on tenterhooks.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: In Sickness and in Wealth: On Benefits
programme.desc: North West claimants struggling against medical and psychological issues while getting by on benefits. Blackpool martial arts enthusiast Mark hopes to get back into paid employment after being dismissed for breaking a colleague's nose, while Liverpool couple Clive and Sheila want to tie the knot on a benefits budget. Autistic Fleetwood man William struggles to get round due to a bad back and varicose veins. He needs a mobility scooter but has benefits have been cut.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Claimants from across the generations, including a 32-year-old former fisherman and his 20-year-old partner who need a bigger home for their five-strong family, and a 57-year-old former welder now struggling to find permanent employment. Plus, a Hastings woman who, after 10 years on the dole, has started to claim her pension and is living comfortably - and now she has a dream of breaking into the music industry.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Karl and Susan worry about Elly, and Paul's attempts to mend bridges suffer a setback when he goes to Susan's aid instead of taking Harlow's assignment to school.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean is furious that Bella took his car and has been out all night, while Colby returns home from hospital to find that his sister has been skipping counselling.(n)

programme.title: Now That's Funny!
programme.desc: The team takes a look at some unlucky beginners, honours the power and glory of the Dad Bod, and finds out if fails are funnier in 3D.(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Gadget-loving 21-year-old Josh lives on a country estate with mum and dad, and is convinced that when he lives rough on the streets for three nights, he will easily make money.(n)

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: Cleo is 16 and weighs in at just over 23 stone thanks to a diet of freezer food and fizzy drinks, but she and her family change their lifestyles to try to halt their weight gain.(n)

programme.title: Big Body Squad
programme.desc: Cameras follow three super-sized individuals whose weight keeps them trapped in their own homes. Weighing nearly 60 stone, Keith is a virtual prisoner in his bed, and even washing him presents a huge challenge for his carers.(n)

programme.title: Flightplan (2005)
programme.desc: A widow boards a plane with her daughter and promptly falls asleep. When she wakes up, the girl has disappeared - and the mother's fear turns to outright panic when the aircraft crew insists she boarded the flight alone, suggesting the child is merely a figment of her distressed imagination. Thriller, starring Jodie Foster, Peter Sarsgaard, Sean Bean and Greta Scacchi.(n)

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder by the Book (1971)
programme.desc: An author of mystery novels kills his former writing partner so he can claim sole credit for their collaborations, and tries to appear innocent by offering to help Columbo solve the crime. Detective drama, directed by Steven Spielberg, starring Peter Falk, Jack Cassidy, Rosemary Forsyth and Barbara Colby.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Falacci investigate the murder of an obstetrician found posed in a ritualistic fashion, spread-eagled on an examination chair, and the clues lead them to the doctor's son. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A film student who has just broken up with her rich boyfriend apparently commits suicide, but the circumstances are suspicious and her former lover soon becomes the prime suspect for her murder. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy witnesses a fatal attack on his stepmother, but is too frightened to tell the police what happened. Benson and Stabler discover the dead woman was on the run from her abusive husband, taking her stepson with her, and before long the race is on to protect the lad from his father. Sandra Bernhard and Rob Estes guest star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape investigation leads the team to a father and son who are being closely guarded under the witness protection programme so they can testify against Russian mobsters. To complicate matters, the victim is arrested on racketeering charges before it is possible to question her in detail. Pam Grier guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a badly beaten youth is found in the luggage compartment on an airport shuttle bus, leading investigators to make further grisly discoveries as a paedophile ring is exposed. Subsequent inquiries lead them to a travel agency specialising in exotic trips for sexual predators. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: The team investigates the apparent suicide of an American citizen in Colombia, whose demise raises concern when it becomes clear he emptied his bank account prior to his death.(n)

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Jack Garrett and the IRT travel to South Korea to investigate a case in which a US college student is murderered and disfigured, and left in an alley for the authorities to find.(n)

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs tries to extract information from a convict on death row about where he hid the bodies of his victims. However, the killer proves reluctant to confess, forcing the team to solve the case by unconventional means. Drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are assigned to investigate the execution-style killing of a prominent businessman, and discover his wife was having an affair. However, further evidence emerges, suggesting a different motive - and an unlikely conspirator. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A harmless tramp is attacked by an over-zealous vigilante and left for dead in a deserted alley, sending Briscoe and Logan in pursuit of his assailant. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A famous rock star is acquitted of raping a fan after the victim's claims are rejected. Logan and Briscoe decide to investigate further, and discover the musician's pleasant reputation does not quite match his personality. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres goes on a stakeout with Metro PD, but when his partner mysteriously disappears, he and the NCIS team find themselves investigating evidence from a decade-old murder case.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The bomb squad is called out to deal with a suspicious suitcase found on a school bus - but it proves to contain the body of an eight-year-old beauty pageant princess. The detectives investigate her murder, and find themselves on the trail of a convicted sex offender with known dealings in pornographic websites.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A quadruple homicide with sexual undertones marks the beginning of a killing spree that has the entire squad racing against the clock to prevent further murders. The investigation leads the detectives from one victim to another before the trail ends at a man with a painful secret. Crime drama, guest starring Frank Langella, Ian Somerhalder and Jason Ritter.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a five-year-old girl is found, leading to the revelation that a homicidal paedophile is on the loose. The subsequent disappearance of a second youngster leads to a race against time to save her from a similar fate. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape of a woman in a coma leads the team to question a doctor whose stem cell research is funded by a billionaire with Parkinson's disease. They discover the tycoon is working in tandem with the medic to find a cure, but the pair's unethical procedures eventually come under scrutiny in court. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Burgess encourages her sister to spend a night out with friends, but when it turns out Nicole never made it home, she is found in a railway station - a victim of sexual assault.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A teenage boy is shot dead, and when the gun is recovered it turns out to be the same one used in a case from 17 years earlier - meaning Voight put away an innocent man.(n)

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Alexis and Castle's routine flight to London turns deadly when the plane's air marshal is found murdered. With the help of Beckett back on the ground, the duo race against time to find the killer before he carries out his fateful plan. Nathan Fillion, Molly C Quinn and Stana Katic star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. The hunt for her killer leads to the discovery that she was caught up in a love triangle at school involving a student with multiple identities. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green look into the shooting of defence lawyer Vance Grodie, who had just won an acquittal for a suspected cop killer. Their investigations reveal a link to a network of conservative extremists, and the discovery leads the case into an examination of civil rights. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Logan face a race against time to catch a serial killer carrying out a series of racially motivated murders. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found dead in his bed, and the team receive an anonymous tip that he was murdered. Logan and Briscoe encounter difficulties at the scene when the widow and her attorney refuse to allow an autopsy. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a dentist leads Goren and Eames to a company at the heart of a criminal conspiracy involving contaminated mouthwash that has caused the deaths of several children. Establishing a motive for the killing proves difficult - and the detectives begin to suspect they are being manipulated by someone close to the investigation. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is discovered in a bathroom next to the battered corpse of her boyfriend's brother, and immediately becomes the prime suspect in his murder. However, the discovery she is a pre-op transsexual leaves the team with new questions to consider. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial rapist represents himself in court and is released on bail, despite his first victim picking him out during an identity parade. Benson and Stabler refuse to give up the chase, but the criminal strikes again, and this time the result is murder. Fred Savage guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives arrest two students suspected of raping and murdering a cancer patient who grew marijuana in her apartment. The pair blame each other, so the prosecution team is faced with the dilemma of charging the older boy as an adult, despite evidence that he was not mentally capable of carrying out the crimes. Christopher Meloni stars.(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: After years living in London, graphic designer Emma and PR consultant Jason want to up sticks and start a new life on the Kent coast with their two teenage boys.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Guest designer Charlie Luxton joins Nick Knowles and the team in Stoke-on-Trent, where they meet terminally ill Haydn Spice and his family. Nick rallies friends, relatives and local traders to turn their property, which resembles a building site, into a comfortable home.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Ramsgate, Kent, to help create a room in which a couple can renew their wedding vows. Designer Brigid Calderhead returns to work with the DIY SOS crew and is tasked with creating an elegant Victorian reception room with a modern edge.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team help a Nottingham couple finish creating a bigger bathroom with wheelchair access for their disabled son after a flood caused by a burst water pipe sets back their original plans.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: An extended edition in which Nick Knowles and the team travel to Toll Bar, the South Yorkshire village devastated by the summer floods of 2007, on a mission to transform two of its water-damaged buildings. They tackle the home of Doreen and Velda Leith, who have looked after more than 50 foster children over a 15-year period, before renovating a local club to try to provide much-needed space and facilities for the community.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Anita Manning and Raj Bisram set out on a road trip through East Anglia to seek out items to sell at an auction in Besston, Norfolk.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning starts this leg negotiating hard in an attempt to catch Raj Bisram's early lead. They shop in Norfolk before heading for an auction in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and Raj Bisram head to Suffolk, Kent and Surrey to search for treasures, before returning to Essex for their third auction.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning has high hopes for an Eastern deity figure she finds as she and Raj Bisram go shopping in the Kent towns of Deal, Sandwich and Faversham.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning's historic big win at the last auction proves irksome for Raj Bisram, who's keen to avoid the wooden spoon. On his home turf in Kent hope springs eternal as Raj learns about the Second World War's Operation Dynamo and the 'Dunkirk spirit'. Meanwhile, Anita pops to Canterbury to uncover the story behind the bloody murder of Thomas Becket at city's Cathedral.(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts take a look at a cottage in Cornwall, a flat in Shepherd's Bush, west London, and a former jeweller's shop in Denton, Greater Manchester, all of which have been sold at auction.(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a two-bedroom semi in Chatham, Kent, an end of terrace in Durham, and a house in Derby, and then follow the sales and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings.(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a house in Stoke-on-Trent, a property in Ramsgate, Kent, and a mid-terrace in south Wales. They then follow the sales and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings.(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to the Dorset seaside resort of Bournemouth to help 67-year-old Ken Robins, the owner of a struggling hotel where all 55 bedrooms have been named after movie stars and famous musicians. After inspecting and experiencing the facilities, Alex reveals she thinks that Ken has not gone far enough with the celebrity theme and offers advice on how to inject more glitz and sparkle into the hotel. Will former accountant Ken agree with her more radical and glamorous blueprint for fun?(n)

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: Pixie McKenna helps a young patient with a six-year posterior problem that started with a tiny hair but ended up as a gaping hole. Christian Jessen advises Dawn, a transitioning male-to-female transsexual who has spent a lifetime in a body that didn't feel right, while in Magaluf, the boys clock up the alcohol count and it's time to check for liver damage. The truck rolls up in Newcastle to find a man with a worrying lump and a lady whose hair loss means her confidence needs rebuilding. Plus, Pixie demonstrates to local girls what smoking can do to the face.(n)

programme.title: Long Lost Family Australia

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)
