programme.title: PLO: History of a Revolution
programme.desc: The beleaguered PLO leader Yasser Arafat was desperate for friends.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: First episode of the drama about a military bomb disposal team working in London during the blitz. New recruit Brian Ash is thrown in at the deep end. Starring Anthony Andrews.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash employs some new technology that does not work. A new recruit gets some training, and a magazine article causes tension amid the team's superior officers.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash and Machin must dispose of a bomb in a school - only to find another device close by, forcing them to split up and defuse one each.(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Britain stood alone in 1940, facing the might of the all-conquering German forces, but Winston Churchill had an idea. He set up an Underground Army, of farmers, teenagers, women and veterans from WW1.(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Britain stood alone in 1940, facing the might of the all-conquering German forces, but Winston Churchill had an idea. He set up an Underground Army, of farmers, teenagers, women and veterans from WW1.(n)

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Hitler on Trial: The Story Behind the Film
programme.desc: Documentary about the Jewish lawyer Hans Litten who put Adolf Hitler on the witness stand in 1931, in the hopes of exposing the truth about his dangerous character.(n)

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Real Story
programme.desc: James Holland explores the Battle of Britain from the German point of view. The author focuses on the tactics, technology and intelligence available to both nations, and examines how they decided to use their resources. He also gains access to first-hand testimonies from German pilots, and diaries and documents that reveal a previously unknown side to this confrontation.(n)

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis.(n)

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing New Cross, Eltham and Catford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: A property developer's plans for a hi-tech bachelor pad in Battersea grind to a halt after he starts building without his neighbours' permission. Sarah Beeny follows Jonathan Moon's progress after he is forced to pay thousands in compensation and sees his costs spiral out of control, forcing him to give up his own home and car.(n)

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother.(n)

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: As the destruction caused by Hitler's V1s in London and the south of England reached critical proportions, a new fighter was introduced to challenge the enemy's flying bombs. Wing Commander 'Bee' Beaumont remembers his first encounters with the Tempest, and the Wilkinson family from Croydon share their account of life on the ground with help from their day-to-day diary.(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Dr Chris Van Tulleken runs a groundbreaking experiment with the University of Surrey to explore whether changing mealtimes can promote weight loss, while Gabriel Weston looks at whether diet products can cause people to put weight on. Plus, an investigation into the chemicals sprayed around houses, the truth about alcohol, and the story of a 12-year-old girl undergoing a new treatment for a peanut allergy.(n)

programme.title: Golden Years (2016)
programme.desc: A retired couple face a grim future after a financial crisis costs them both their pensions. Refusing to take the situation lying down, they resolve to take back what is rightfully theirs with a series of daring bank robberies. Comedy, starring Bernard Hill, Virginia McKenna, Simon Callow and Sue Johnston.(n)

programme.title: Active Measures (2018)
programme.desc: Director Jack Bryan addresses the allegations of collusion between the Trump campaign and agents of the Russian state.(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson.(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson.(n)

programme.title: Undercover Hooligan (2016)
programme.desc: Suspended cop Michael Clarke is tasked with infiltrating an infamous London gang and bringing down its leader. British crime drama, starring Kris Johnson and Patrick Connolly.(n)

programme.title: Burning Men (2018)
programme.desc: Two struggling musicians plan to sell their precious collection of vinyl records to fund a road trip to Memphis. They resort to stealing an extremely rare black metal album, and begin to suspect a curse has been placed on the record as a run of disastrous fortune befalls them. Drama, starring Edward Hayter and Aki Omoshaybi.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.sub-title: Forest Hill, Hither Green, Cubitt Town
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: Food busker John Quilter prepares his chicken pie, and Mr Shemzy samples Ethiopian food for the first time. Plus, the team introduces the Rib Man.(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: X's secret agent past catches up with him at Paris Fashion Week, and the girls accompany him on one last mission.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls go to Australia to release a new single - but someone steals a recording of all their latest songs with the intention of selling it to their rivals.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar thinks he has been blessed with the power to turn into animals - which results in a duck taking command of the ship when the Vikings all think it is their captain.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar thinks he has been cursed with bad luck just as three rival Vikings come to the village to challenge him for leadership.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bertie becomes engrossed in a new game and forgets about his friends.(n)

programme.title: Zigby

programme.desc: Jack buys a pair of magic shoes that will help him win a dance contest. However, he finds that once they start dancing, they cannot stop.(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A sceptical Ash is ordered to deliver a defused but otherwise intact bomb to Dr Gillespie.(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Dr Chris Van Tulleken runs a groundbreaking experiment with the University of Surrey to explore whether changing mealtimes can promote weight loss, while Gabriel Weston looks at whether diet products can cause people to put weight on. Plus, an investigation into the chemicals sprayed around houses, the truth about alcohol, and the story of a 12-year-old girl undergoing a new treatment for a peanut allergy.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mette and Chris from Brighton want a holiday home on Majorca, so Scarlette Douglas lines up five properties for them and their two children on the north coast of the island.(n)

programme.title: Anthea Turner's Hot Topics
programme.desc: Anthea quizzes the experts to find out if the UK will be carbon neutral by 2050, and what changes will have to be made in people's homes to accomplish this.(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Britain stood alone in 1940, facing the might of the all-conquering German forces, but Winston Churchill had an idea. He set up an Underground Army, of farmers, teenagers, women and veterans from WW1.(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Britain stood alone in 1940, facing the might of the all-conquering German forces, but Winston Churchill had an idea. He set up an Underground Army, of farmers, teenagers, women and veterans from WW1.(n)

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann.(n)

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw.(n)

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother.(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets first-time developers Alex and Vonny Shelley, who try to transform a run-down mid-terrace house in Nottingham on a budget of just £5,000. After six weeks, costs spiral out of control and their friends are too busy to help with the building work.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: The team deals with a bomb at a gas works, only to discover another explosive device - which is set to go off at a specific time.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground.(n)

programme.title: Boy Soldiers of WWII
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the truth behind the boys who lied about their age in order to enlist and fight in the Second World War, and their shocking stories from the frontline.(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: First of four dramas telling the stories of people facing life-changing decisions in a world where even the smallest choices are a luxury. Carol is a tough single mother striving to keep her family together. But when her teenage sons commit a random act of violence that ends in the death of a stranger, will she protect them or do the right thing? Starring Olivia Colman, Neil Maskell, Sarah Hoare and Billy and JJ Pamphilon.(n)

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: MMA & K1 from the Troxy in London title fight Mihai Zmarandescu vs Alfie Hawes plus Erol Raif vs George Zorilov, Kat Freeman vs Kat Twardowska.(n)

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Martha defends a professional footballer accused of assaulting another player, but because the incident was witnessed by thousands of spectators in the stadium, it seems an impossible task. With her client reluctant to co-operate, she must gain his trust to discover a secret he's determined to keep hidden. Up against Clive in court, can the barrister convince the sportsman to help himself? Meanwhile, a resignation sends shock waves through the chambers and Billy takes steps to ensure the future of Shoe Lane - with or without him.(n)

programme.title: Spivs (2004)
programme.desc: A professional con-man spends his time honing the skills of his protege and making sure his gang of conniving criminals stays out of trouble. However, when a simple heist backfires the ragtag group are left with a lorry-load of illegal immigrants on their hands - and an angry smuggler with revenge on his mind soon adds to their woes. Crime drama, starring Ken Stott,, Nick Moran and Dominic Monaghan.(n)

programme.title: 12 In a Box (2007)
programme.desc: A group of old schoolfriends is challenged to spend four days in a country house, making no contact with the outside world - with £1million up for grabs if they can make it. However, completing the challenge is made more complicated when one of them drops dead. Comedy, starring Katy Wix and Kenneth Collard.(n)

programme.title: Jungle Street (1960)
programme.desc: Two men commit a robbery, but when one of them takes the rap for it, the other muscles in on his girlfriend. Crime drama, starring Jill Ireland, David McCallum and Kenneth Cope.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.sub-title: Forest Hill, Hither Green, Cubitt Town
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band have a concert the same day Kim is competing in a sporting event, but an inventor offers to use his time machine to let her be in two places at once.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Dwayne falls in love with Kate after she saves his life - much to Dee Dee's annoyance.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The king of Sweden kidnaps Ylva to be his royal cook - but Vic offers him something far more precious in exchange for her freedom.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Vic has to miss a voyage to due chickenpox, which comes in handy when his shipmates need him to come and rescue them.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara's sandcastle vanishes, leaving Zigby to find an explanation for its disappearance.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra gets into trouble when he agrees to make McMeer disappear.(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack, Ah Chu and Tashi find a haunted house in the forest, where Little Sister is hiding a tiger cub. However, she soon finds that others are looking for her new pet.(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: BabaYaga offers to magically turn Jack into a great singer - but the spell goes wrong and he ends up swapping voices with a pig.(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A bomb is found in a nightclub which German scientists claim cannot be disarmed, and Ash receives a mysterious message. Guest starring Judy Geeson (the original 1970s Poldark).(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad.(n)

programme.title: Anthea Turner's Hot Topics
programme.desc: Anthea looks into the UK's attitude to money, how people can get a handle on their finances and ensure a happier future.(n)

programme.title: Boy Soldiers of WWII
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the truth behind the boys who lied about their age in order to enlist and fight in the Second World War, and their shocking stories from the frontline.(n)

programme.title: Trio (1950)
programme.desc: Adaptation of three short stories by W Somerset Maugham, The Verger, Mr Know-Al, and The Sanatorium. Starring James Hayter, Anne Crawford and Jean Simmons.(n)

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex.(n)

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist talks to Primal Scream singer Bobby Gillespie, who discusses his time in the Jesus and Mary Chain and the records that fuelled his love of music.(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets first-time developer Martin Sutherland, who plans to convert a run-down three-bedroom flat in Earl's Court into a luxury five-bed apartment in the hope of attracting corporate clients. But his budget is small and so is the building, forcing him to reconsider his lofty ambitions.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A new commanding officer pushes the team too hard, leaving the overworked team planning a revolt. Ash and Susan consider their future.(n)

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son.(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks into the past of Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse, which is located close to the dormant volcano Arthur's Seat. Events in the royal residence, one of the smallest palaces in Britain, have determined the futures of England, France and Scotland, and it was the last place in which a royal prince challenged the right of an English king to sit on the throne. Fiona also examines objects including the Darnley jewel, which features numerous hidden messages, and the needlework of a doomed queen.(n)

programme.title: Cries from Syria (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about crimes against humanity in Syria, featuring first-hand accounts from activists, child protesters and a former army general.(n)

programme.title: K-Shop (2016)
programme.desc: A Bournemouth takeaway owner despairs of his drunken, abusive customers and is finally pushed to the limit when his father is killed in a violent altercation. He begins murdering the people who make his life a misery, and disposes of the bodies by making them into kebabs. Horror, starring Reece Noi and Ewen MacIntosh.(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
